name: updateScriptContent
description: Updates the content of an Apps Script project. You can add multiple script files (Code.gs, etc.) and the manifest (appsscript.json).

scriptId.description: The ID of the Apps Script project to update.

name.description: File name without extension (e.g., "Code" for Code.gs, "appsscript" for manifest).

type.description: File type: SERVER_JS for .gs files, JSON for appsscript.json manifest.

source.description: The source code content of the file.

files.description: Array of files to include in the script project.
